title: elytrigia angularis
intro: Elytrigia angularis, also known as Elymus angustatus, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elytrigia angularis include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
